"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed tighter framings, showing a good understanding but not fully reframing all aspects.",
  "R1.2": "The agent walked through the argument chain, flagging inconsistencies and providing minimal fixes.",
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audited claims against evidence, identifying unsupported parts and suggesting improvements.",
  "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainties but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The draft mostly stayed within scope with minor deviations.",
  "RX.4": "No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original draft.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not."
},

"blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed tighter framings, showing a good understanding but not fully reframing all aspects.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked through the argument chain, flagging inconsistencies and providing minimal fixes.
rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited claims against evidence, identifying unsupported parts and suggesting improvements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainties but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The draft mostly stayed within scope with minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not.
